# Differential Pressure Sensor Calibration and Zero Point Adjustment: Field Calibration Procedure for Installed Pressure Transmitters

## 适用受众
Commissioning_Engineer

## 写作角度说明
压差传感器校准与零点调校是调试工程师确保压差测量准确性的关键步骤。传感器在运输和安装过程中可能发生零点漂移，需要使用标准压力源进行现场校准，确保测量精度满足工艺控制要求。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Adjusting the transmitter zero without first checking for mounting stress — the sensor may be reading a zero offset caused by process connection strain rather than a true sensor drift.

## 参考素材
- Calibration standard: reference pressure gauge with ±0.05% FS accuracy or better, traceable calibration certificate valid within 12 months
- Pre-calibration check: power up transmitter for minimum 30 minutes → check mounting torque on process connection → check cable shield grounding → verify no visible damage
- Zero-point calibration: vent both sides of sensor to atmosphere → record reading → adjust zero potentiometer or software zero trim until reading is 0.0 Pa → record as-found and as-left values
- Span calibration: apply known reference pressure (e.g., 50 Pa for a 0-100 Pa sensor) → record reading → calculate error → adjust span trim if error exceeds ±1% FS
- Documentation: calibration certificate per ISO 17025 format, as-found data, as-left data, calibration equipment serial numbers and certificate references, next calibration due date

## 关键词
Pressure Sensor Calibration, Zero Adjustment, Span Calibration, Transmitter Calibration, Differential Pressure, Field Calibration
